author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(links): ensure cmd-click always opens in new tab (#5994)
body:
* fix(links): ensure cmd-click always opens in new tab

Some links were always preventDefault-ed, which prevented cmd-click from opening them in a new tab.

This is now tested for all widgets that have links, and cmd-click will always open in a new tab.

* bump bundles
